seoTitle: Mindarabin vs Mindarie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mindarabin and Mindarie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mindarabin and Mindarie.
heading: Mindarabin vs Mindarie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mindarabin, Western Australia and Mindarie, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mindarie has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mindarabin (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mindarabin or Mindarie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mindarabin has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Mindarie scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mindarabin scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Mindarie scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mindarabin or Mindarie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mindarie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
